workspace.title: Workspace

workspace.welcomeDesc: Create, edit, and preview your visual novel projects.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.welcomeMessage: Start a conversation to create your visual novel!
chat.welcomeHint: Try: "Help me create a character" or "Write a scene"
chat.noContext: No project context loaded. Open a project first.
chat.noProjectDesc: Create or open a project to start chatting with AI context.
chat.replyCharacter:
Great idea! To create a character in ADV.JS, you can use Claude Code or Cursor with the ADV.JS skills:

```
{'@'}character_name
Dialogue text here...
```

Try describing the character's personality, appearance, and role — I'll help you structure the .adv.md content.
chat.replyScene:
Scenes in ADV.JS are defined using frontmatter and narration blocks:

```md
---
scene: classroom
background: school_classroom.png
---

> The morning sun streams through the classroom windows.
```

Describe your scene and I'll help format it!
chat.replyDefault:
I'm your ADV.JS creative assistant! 🎮

Currently I provide guidance for creating visual novels. For full AI-powered creation, use **Claude Code** or **Cursor** with ADV.JS skills installed.

Here's what you can ask me about:
• Character creation and dialogue
• Scene descriptions and transitions
• Story branching and choices
• World-building and outlines

What would you like to create?
chat.aiNotConfiguredDesc: Set up an AI provider to get real AI-powered responses.
chat.aiNotConfiguredMessage:
⚠️ **AI provider is not configured yet.** Please go to **Settings → AI Provider** to set up your API key.

Once configured, I'll be able to help you create characters, write scenes, and build your visual novel with real AI capabilities!
chat.errorAuth: 🔑 **Authentication Error**: Invalid API key. Please check your settings.
chat.errorRateLimit: ⏳ **Rate Limited**: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
chat.errorNetwork: 🌐 **Network Error**: Could not connect to the AI provider. Please check your internet connection.
chat.errorTimeout: ⏰ **Timeout**: The request took too long. Please try again.

settings.title: Me
settings.cosGuideStep1: Log in to the {console}, go to "Bucket List", and create or select a bucket.
settings.cosGuideStep2Bucket: The bucket name is shown at the top of the bucket detail page, e.g. "my-bucket-1250000000".
settings.cosGuideStep2Region: Region is displayed next to the bucket name, e.g. "ap-guangzhou".
settings.cosGuideStep3: Go to {camConsole} > "API Keys", create a key pair to get SecretId and SecretKey.
settings.cosGuideStep4Cors: In the bucket settings, go to "Security" > "CORS", add a rule: Origin = *, Methods = GET,PUT,DELETE,HEAD, Headers = *.
settings.clearCacheMessage: This will clear all locally stored data including project list and settings. Are you sure?
settings.clearCacheDone: Cache cleared. Reload the app to apply.
settings.accountDesc: Sync projects and settings across devices
settings.corsHint: Please ensure CORS is enabled on your COS bucket
settings.autoSaveDesc: Auto-upload to cloud after editing (2s delay)
settings.autoSyncDesc: Periodically sync files between local and cloud
settings.aiDesc: Configure AI models for creative assistance
settings.aiTemperatureHint: Lower = more focused, Higher = more creative
settings.aiSystemPromptPlaceholder: Custom instructions for the AI assistant...
settings.aiImageHint: Image generation is optional. Without it, prompt templates will be generated for use with external tools.

contentEditor.characterIdHelper: Used as filename. Letters, numbers, hyphens only.

common.knowledgeRefInstruction: Below is professional knowledge related to the current topic. Please reference it naturally in your responses:
common.ruleStayInCharacter: - Always respond in character, never break character
common.ruleKeepStyle: - Maintain the character's speech style and personality traits
common.ruleUseBackground: - Answer based on the character's background and areas of expertise
common.ruleExpressEmotion: - Express the character's emotions and attitudes when appropriate
common.ruleReferMemory: - If there are character memories, naturally reference past conversation experiences

characterChat.roleInstruction: You are now playing the following character. Always maintain consistency. Reply to the user's messages in the character's tone and style.
characterChat.contextSummaryPrefix:
[Conversation Summary] Below is a summary of previous conversations:
{summary}

groupChat.roleInstruction: You are now playing the following character. Always maintain consistency.
groupChat.ruleGroupConversation: - You are participating in a group conversation. Only say what your character would say, keep it brief and natural.
groupChat.ruleNoSpeakForOthers: - Do not speak or act for other characters
groupChat.ruleCanMention: - You can {'@'} or directly address other characters present
groupChat.consecutiveWarning: Note: {id} has been speaking consecutively. Please choose someone else.
groupChat.speakerSelectionSystem: You are a conversation analysis system. Return only the character ID, no other text.

viewMode.characterPrefix:
The user is playing as "{name}", a character in this world. {personality}Treat them as a character present in the scene, address them by name, and react naturally to their presence. Here is information about "{name}":
{charInfo}
viewMode.godPrefix: The user is an omniscient narrator/creator who exists outside the story world. They can observe everything, know all characters' thoughts, and guide the direction of events. Respond as you would to your creator — you may share inner thoughts, break the fourth wall, and accept narrative instructions.

memory.emotionalState: Current emotional state: Affinity {affinity}/100, Trust {trust}/100, Mood: {mood}
